name: NBC Suit (Yellow Variant)
location: All tiers. Note: Full NBC suit (5 pieces) plus respirator with Gas Mask Filter required for toxic zones.

name: Chewy
location: Hoth Control Room. Disclaimer: The Chewy mask only acts as an NBC hood. You will still need a respirator with filter for the Chewy variant suit to be effective.
